variantDefinitions.F: Elite-only stronger reset (slot Q≥90 or tenure≥12 & slot Q≥85)
variantDefinitions.G: E + longer shock (8–12 periods, stronger prog drag, gradual decay)
variantDefinitions.H: E + revenue/appeal coupling (2–6 period share drag)
variantDefinitions.I: Combined F + G + mild H (production candidate)

recommendationRationale: Baseline A: 84.67% recover, 41.4% exceed, median Q 0.5y; 95–99 21.58%; mean OQ 67.33. Prior E: 73.56% recover, 95–99 17.55%, mean OQ 65.24. Best grid variant G: major recover 72.8%, exceed 39.1%, median Q 2y; elite median rev 0y; 95–99 16.97%; mean OQ 65.29. Strongest levers: recover Q → E vs A (combined shock+reset baseline) (-11.11); 95–99 bucket → E vs A (combined shock+reset baseline) (-4.03); median Q time → E vs A (combined shock+reset baseline) (+1.5). Directionally correct but misses one or more targets — tune parameters.
